programme.title: E40 - Snow
programme.desc: It has snowed and almost no one can get about. Stanley builds a snow plough out of surf boards to clear the streets and makes a huge snow hill so that his friends can sledge down it.

programme.title: E3 - Promises
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: E17 - Svalbard Global Seed Vault, Norway
programme.desc: Ubercorn and Glitch head to the Svalbard Global Seed Vault. But, just like when they were cadets together, the two of them get into trouble.

programme.title: E18 - Apple
programme.desc: Apple sings in celebration of her great-great-grandad, Apple Tree's, 100th birthday.

programme.title: E2 - Speedy Pea
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Supertato's brand new Tato Car but doesn't realise that the Grape Kids are in the back seat. Supertato has to get the Grape Kids back to safety and save his car.

programme.title: E7 - Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: E2 - The Face Painting Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E33 - Go Jet Academy: Geo Challenge
programme.desc: The Go Jetters test their knowledge and teamwork in a tricky maze full of trials. But can they escape the labyrinth, beat Glitch's high score and still keep the team together?

programme.title: E2 - Hospital
programme.desc: Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very curious x-ray from Nurse Bingo. It seems he has a cat in his tummy!

programme.title: E20 - Driving
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: E11 - Andy And The Baby Dusky Leaf Monkey
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Malaysia, South East Asia on a baby animal mission to find out why new born dusky leaf monkeys look so different to their parents.

programme.title: E28 - The Space Badge
programme.desc: Duggee teaches the squirrels all about the stars, the planets and the Milky Way!

programme.title: E39 - Wimbledon, England
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are at Centre Court in Wimbledon to watch the world's most famous tennis tournament.

programme.title: E38 - Great Mosque Of Djenne, Africa
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch is invited to Djenne in Mali, Africa, to visit the people and to see one of his favourite things at work - mud.

programme.title: E27 - Music Fixer
programme.desc: Sarah's Tuba is making some very peculiar sounds, so a trip to the Music Shop is in order.

programme.title: E28 - Wool On Wheels
programme.desc: Scarf Lady is holding a 'knitted treats' sale in the park, but the weather is causing a problem...

programme.title: E41 - Power
programme.desc: Stanley needs to do some jobs for the community, but all his vehicles are out of power due to a cloud of butterflies obscuring them and he needs to figure out how to move them.

programme.title: E40 - Snow
programme.desc: It has snowed and almost no one can get about. Stanley builds a snow plough out of surf boards to clear the streets and makes a huge snow hill so that his friends can sledge down it.

programme.title: E25 - I'm Going To Cannonball In The Pool
programme.desc: Water fights, bodyboarding and ice cream. The funny little animals chat about going on holiday.

programme.title: E9 - It's Time To Grow A Flower
programme.desc: JoJo tries to grow a daffodil but is disheartened to learn that it will take a long time to bloom. Cynthia and Gran Gran show JoJo how to take care of it and the best way to measure its growth.

programme.title: E3 - Promises
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: E18 - Shopping Shenanigans, Istanbul, Turkey
programme.desc: Glitch's wishes cause underground trouble in Istanbul - an ancient ceiling may collapse!

programme.title: E18 - Apple
programme.desc: Apple sings in celebration of her great-great-grandad, Apple Tree's, 100th birthday.

programme.title: E2 - Speedy Pea

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Time-Travel Night Train
programme.desc: These days, night trains are so popular that tickets are almost impossible to book. “Time-Travel Night Train” explores the enduring appeal of night trains, journeying across time and space to rediscover the magic of overnight rail travel.

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Trip To The Origin Of Japan
This World Is Filled With Wants 5Min.
E23
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: E19 - To The Rhythm Of Samba
programme.desc: An immersion into the heart of the Rio Carnival through an exhibition of around fifty dazzling costumes at the Museum of Walloon Life in Liege; the Zucchero pastry shop, a love story as beautiful as it is delicious; a visit to Waterloo to discover the Zita Bay concept store.

programme.title: E97
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E1 - Leaping Into Life
programme.desc: It’s spring, and the farm is bursting with new life. Watch a ewe give birth to twins, an orphaned Hereford calf struggle to find a surrogate mother, and the top hen nestle down in her maternity coop.

programme.title: E2 - Great Escape
programme.desc: Experience life on the farm as things heat up for summer. Watch animals swelter in a rare heatwave, try to stay cool in the nearby freshwater stream, and stash supplies for fall.

programme.title: E4 - Coral Seas
programme.desc: Marvel at North America’s natural wonders as Lizzie swims through astonishing coral reefs, digs for ancient fossils, and treks through jungles on tropical shores. Prowl with jaguars that stalk a Costa Rican beach and meet the planet’s biggest sharks.

programme.title: E1 - The Little Penguin
programme.desc: Follow the story of Harry and Sally, a pair of little penguins. These flightless, flippered birds create some of the noisiest neighborhoods in nature. Theirs is a family saga of faithful relationships, committed homemaking, and vigorous nightlife.

programme.title: E1 - A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Dive into a busy summer at the RSPCA Wildlife Hospital, where vet Emily takes the pressure off a gassy koala mum. Shadow the team as they fight a wave of lorikeet paralysis syndrome and see vet Karina use a teddy bear to rescue a flying fox pup.

programme.title: E118 - Wi-Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Tori's flight home is delayed leaving her no time to finish a school project with her friends. She attempts to get the work done with them over video chat but things keep getting in the way.

programme.title: E126 - #BrainCrush
programme.desc: Sam and Cat notice everyone, including their friends, are becoming obsessed with a new phone game, 'Brain Crush.' The game distracts the audience at Cat's one woman show.

programme.title: E112 - Bad Eggs / Out of Bounds
programme.desc: Best ruins Bester's painting by accident so in order to avoid hurting her feelings he blames an innocent chicken. // Having lost their soccer ball over the garden fence, the twins have no option but to find a way to get it back.

programme.title: E408 - Can't Hardly Wait / A Mutt Above
programme.desc: Lori takes a waitressing job at Dad's restaurant, but it turns out that serving is harder than she anticipated. // Spurred on by a classmate's mocking about Charles, Lana decides to train him to compete in a local dog show.

programme.title: E219 - Lay Lay's Little Little
programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are assigned a shared Little Buddy, Milaena, they spend the week attempting to create a mini-Sadie and mini-Lay Lay, or 'Say Lay', instead of learning about what Milaena likes and what makes her unique.

programme.title: E208 - iPie
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.

programme.title: E310 - Biscuit Ballyhoo / Student Driver Survivor
programme.desc: After the Science Scouts begin selling biscuits to fund a trip to Mars, Mr. Krabs joins the ring and turns it into a competition. // When a competitor threatens to shut down Mrs. Puff's boating school, she must rely on SpongeBob to stay in business.

programme.title: E410 - A Grave Mistake / Leader of the Rack
programme.desc: Lucy faces off against her friend Haiku to become the new president of the Young Morticians' Club at school. // Leni is promoted to temporary manager at work, but she worries about remaining good friends with Miguel and Fiona.

programme.title: E105 - Tori the Zombie
programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.title: E219 - Lay Lay's Little Little
programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are assigned a shared Little Buddy, Milaena, they spend the week attempting to create a mini-Sadie and mini-Lay Lay, or 'Say Lay', instead of learning about what Milaena likes and what makes her unique.

programme.title: E313 - Squidina's Holidaze Special
programme.desc: Squidina has to direct her school holiday play, but her script was mangled by Patrick.

programme.title: E113 - Nitwit Neighborhood News
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina report the news around Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: E705 - Road Trip: Bizarritorium
programme.desc: When Mom is assigned a travel article at work, she takes the entire family on a cross country road trip. But the trip gets off to a bumpy start when Lincoln tries to change Mom's itinerary to go to Dr. Weirdly's Bizarritorium.

programme.title: E277 - Captain Pipsqueak/Plane to Sea
programme.desc: Plankton joins the League of E.V.I.L. // SpongeBob and Patrick take Squidward on a plane to a tropical resort.

programme.title: E208 - iPie
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.

programme.title: E408 - Can't Hardly Wait / A Mutt Above
programme.desc: Lori takes a waitressing job at Dad's restaurant, but it turns out that serving is harder than she anticipated. // Spurred on by a classmate's mocking about Charles, Lana decides to train him to compete in a local dog show.

programme.title: E313 - Squidina's Holidaze Special
programme.desc: Squidina has to direct her school holiday play, but her script was mangled by Patrick.

programme.title: E410 - A Grave Mistake / Leader of the Rack
programme.desc: Lucy faces off against her friend Haiku to become the new president of the Young Morticians' Club at school. // Leni is promoted to temporary manager at work, but she worries about remaining good friends with Miguel and Fiona.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Unang Hirit
programme.desc: A news magazine show that offers humor and information from hard news to special interests segments on travel, health, housekeeping and entertainment.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E1 - 事業有成女強人vs全職奶爸
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E6 - 黎明克服恐高魔咒
programme.desc: 由黎明、林依晨、魏晨、謝依霖、鄭元暢、盛一倫、朱珠、李小鵬、王濛、潘曉婷、唐曉天、陳楚河共十二位明星和奧運冠軍參加，以輪換搭檔的形式，在全球十二座體育城市展開一系列競技PK。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E12 - 共賞南北半球星光點點
programme.desc: 繼續重磅集結，除了經驗豐富的 “全勤者” 吳奇隆外，新成員林峯、丁禹兮、林允、趙小棠也加入「追星團」；在「星空日記」的魔法下，將打游戲的宅男、疲憊的職場打工人和沉浸於網上沖浪的情侶帶出原有空間一路滑行到戶外，讓受困於都市生活的他們探尋星空與美好的秘密。

programme.title: E12 - 共賞南北半球星光點點
programme.desc: 繼續重磅集結，除了經驗豐富的 “全勤者” 吳奇隆外，新成員林峯、丁禹兮、林允、趙小棠也加入「追星團」；在「星空日記」的魔法下，將打游戲的宅男、疲憊的職場打工人和沉浸於網上沖浪的情侶帶出原有空間一路滑行到戶外，讓受困於都市生活的他們探尋星空與美好的秘密。

E22
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: C Dans L'air:2026
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: E18 - Cantal, On The Shoulder Of A Giant
programme.desc: An ancient volcano with grandiose landscapes, Cantal reveals a raw and preserved nature, shaped by time and humans.

programme.title: E3 - Guardians Of The Garden
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: E6 - Vesunna/Wendy Andreu/Alainpaul
programme.desc: A 4,000 square metre domus at the Vesunna Gallo-Roman Museum in Perigueux. Wendy Andreu structures each material with the same interest in creating unique objects. AlainPaul invites himself into a dance dressing room where clothes stretch and float. Jerome Clochard restores mosaics in Brittany.

programme.desc: An ancient volcano with grandiose landscapes, Cantal reveals a raw and preserved nature, shaped by time and humans.

programme.title: C Dans L'air:2026
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: E6 - Vesunna/Wendy Andreu/Alainpaul
programme.desc: A 4,000 square metre domus at the Vesunna Gallo-Roman Museum in Perigueux. Wendy Andreu structures each material with the same interest in creating unique objects. AlainPaul invites himself into a dance dressing room where clothes stretch and float. Jerome Clochard restores mosaics in Brittany.

programme.title: E4 - A New Home For Lison

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

Oto Flips
programme.desc: Determined to win a shiny trophy of his own, Oto decides to attempt a world record for the biggest pancake. But can he really make it all by himself? The team sets off to a pancake festival at a Sugarbush in Quebec, Canada, to find out!

programme.title: When Yellow Met Blue
programme.desc: One sunny afternoon, Luna paints her backyard, but her yellow sun turns green! With Jupiter and Clyde, she dives into the painting to discover how yellow became green.

programme.title: Happy Birthday
programme.desc: The kids throw a surprise birthday party for Yoko, and hope that their home-made present pleases him...

programme.title: Trip to Central African Republic
programme.desc: Zoe is grumpy about babysitting her little sister. Alim suggests Milo take over, but he protests, saying babysitting is a girl's job. Alim takes them to the Central African Republic, where Yamba shows that among the Aka, men care for babies.

programme.title: Trip to Senegal
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo show up with one baguette instead of two. When Alim suggests they could have bargained, Zoe and Milo refuse-bargaining isn't an option! Alim takes them to Senegal, where along with chasing chickens on bikes, bargaining is considered an art.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: Kiwifruit Valley Flower Show
programme.desc: Darwin, Newts and Heni compete in the Kiwifruit Valley Flower Show and have to get creative when things don't go to plan.

programme.title: Functions
programme.desc: Instead of writing and re-writing the same lines of codes several times, there is a way in which you can write thousands of lines of code once. Find out more about functions and how you can use this method.

programme.title: Wes P: World Famous Physical Comedian
programme.desc: Viral media sensation and eight GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS holder Wes P, also known as Mr Uekusa, meets Aisheshek Magauina and shares some of the basics of his iconic tricks, which ultimately led him to hold many record titles.

programme.title: Challenges
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are halfway through their time at Vet School. And the animal care challenges keep coming. Will and Saira are facing a massive challenge as they try to figure out what is wrong with Caspar, the Boxer dog.

programme.title: AIDA, The Robot Cat
programme.desc: To help Granny keep the house tidy the Buffycats ask Edison, the inventor cat, for help. By recycling various objects, Edison invents AIDA, a robot cat that will take care of all the housework. But Boss wants to sabotage AIDA...

programme.title: Eyeball Action
programme.desc: How do you see the world in three dimensions? Find out as the doctors reveal the incredible eye muscles that control how you focus on things close-up and far away. Meanwhile, in the Emergency Department, Ted has a big cut on his head, and Millie has a sore foot.

programme.title: Incredible Mallakhamb: Ancient Indian Gymnastics
programme.desc: Mallakhamb is an ancient Indian sport that involves performing acrobatic tricks on a wooden pole. The Mallakhamb team shows us how they achieved the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the fastest time to complete five synchronized sequences on a Mallakhamb pole.

programme.desc: Neil Morrissey, Jason Gardiner, Alex Scott, Michelle Collins, Chelsee Healey, Samantha Barks and Stuart Pearce continue their expedition through the South African bush - or at least, six of them do, after one was eliminated last week. Their next mission involves locating their next meal - a dead springbok in the Karoo mountains. The only problem is, to get it back they have to divide it into pieces and carry it in their rucksacks across ropes suspended 50ft above a rocky ravine. Anyone who fails

programme.title: Love For All Seasons
programme.desc: Millionaire Tiger Hung is told to find cure at the mysterious all-women martial arts sect Omei, and there he meets Omei's young master May. The healing process moves smoothly until May's big sister Misery shows up and challenges May into a duel. Misery has lost her mind and she threatens to destroy Omei unless May beats her with the sect's long-lost 'Heartbreak Sword Technique'...

programme.title: The Seven Angels
programme.desc: In an unprecedented and sensational move, the police force dismisses seven policewomen simultaneously. They are The Flirt, Diety, Gold-digger, Sherry Holmes, Sixfooter Plus, Plump and Sgt. Crab-pincers. In fact, they are all assigned to a case to catch a sex fiend who has already murdered four night club hostesses. The seven girls work at the biggest night club Crime City Club after training. A promotional gimmick launches: prize for the team of hostesses with the most votes from customers. QE's team jumps to the lead and has a good laugh at the former policewomen. Crab-pincers is angered. Putting aside their assignment, she and her girls go to war to win customers and votes. At the same time, a sex magazine photographer Big John, who happens to be QE's brother, invites The Flirt to a photo session...

programme.title: E7 - Rottnest Island To Fremantle
programme.desc: Julia Zemiro explores Western Australia, uncovering the evolution of Wadjemup (Rottnest Island) from prison to tourist hotspot and Fremantle's transformation from a footnote in history to being in the global spotlight.

programme.desc: Clarence creates a rustic native display, Guest Presenter Thanh bites into delectable dragon fruit, Josh meets a team of smart sniffer dogs that can detect plant disease, and Tammy finds clever plantings on a coastal terrace.

programme.title: E1 - Bull Sharks
programme.desc: In northern Queensland, nature nerd Dr Ann Jones comes face to face with one of Australia's mightiest predators, the bull shark, and discovers there's much more to them than meets the eye.

programme.title: E2 - When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Get ready to laugh as everything goes hilariously wrong for Kii & Yii & their friends! The chaos starts when Robot creates a jelly-making machine, but it goes haywire & he ends up stuck inside a giant wobbly jelly! Then, Princess Cat puts way too much soap in her washing machine, causing it to overflow & fill her entire castle with bubbles! From a wobbly tooth to a picky eater, it's one funny problem after another!

programme.title: E1 - From Waterfalls to Outer Space!
programme.desc: Join Gecko on his biggest adventures yet, from waterfalls to outer space! First, when Grandma's caravan rolls into a river & heads for a waterfall, Gecko must perform a daring chase to save her! Then, a lovely day at the beach becomes perilous when some vehicles get caught in the tide, requiring a helicopter rescue. The adventure blasts off as the Mechs accidentally launch their homemade spaceship to the moon & need to use solar power to get home!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E1 - A Day in the Life of JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Spend a fun-filled day in the life of JJ & his friends! First, Ms. Appleberry takes the Melon Patch kids on a beach field trip to learn about different types of vehicles. Then, JJ gets to bring a special guest to class: his dog, Bingo! Everyone has a great time as Bingo plays, snacks & even saves the day! The adventure continues at the farm, where JJ & Grandpa have to wrangle all the baby animals after they escape from their pen!

programme.title: E5 - Super Creative Day of Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E2 - When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Get ready to laugh as everything goes hilariously wrong for Kii & Yii & their friends! The chaos starts when Robot creates a jelly-making machine, but it goes haywire & he ends up stuck inside a giant wobbly jelly! Then, Princess Cat puts way too much soap in her washing machine, causing it to overflow & fill her entire castle with bubbles! programme.title: E2 - Baby John's Favorite Animal Songs!
programme.desc: Sing along to Baby John's favorite animal songs! First, the kids welcome a new puppy named Bingo to the family & sing the classic nursery rhyme about him! Then, the family acts out the story of Humpty Dumpty Sat on a Wall. The animal fun continues as Baby John spends the day at the aquarium & runs into Baby Shark! He learns the 'Baby Shark' dance & has an exciting dance marathon! Plus, the family dresses up like little dinosaurs!

programme.title: E1 - Taking on the Baddest Baddies in Town!
programme.desc: It's up to Mila & Morphle to take on the baddest baddies in town! The trouble begins when the Bandits use robot versions of Mila & Morphle to cause chaos. Then, the friends discover a Mirror World where they meet Orphle, Morphle's naughty reflection. When Orphle escapes & causes trouble, they have to stop him! The action continues as the Bandits use a zapper to turn animals into giants & team up with Orphle to escape from jail!

programme.desc: During the Civil War, a daring prison break frees hundreds of Union soldiers. When he was captured and sent to Libby Prison in Richmond, Virginia, he engineered one of the greatest mass escapes in history.

E1 - The Power/Night Owl/Under The Hood/150-Piece Kit/Silver Dude
programme.desc: Rigby steals a magic keyboard from a preoccupied sorcerer. When Mordecai and Rigby accidentally make a hole in the wall while wrestling a stuffed animal, they use the keyboard to make Pops and Benson give them raises to try to pay for it.

programme.title: E172 - Birthday Grifts/ Daffy Magician: Vintage /Porkys Tub-O-War/Oregon Fail/ Duck Hunting
programme.desc: Elmer throws a birthday party. Porky goes old school. Marvin the Martian tries to give his dog a bath.

programme.title: E80 - Super Watermelon Island/Gem Drill
programme.desc: Steven finds out what happened to all those sentient watermelons he created.

programme.title: E6 - Burrito/Charlie/Jean Jacket/Food Truck/Primal
programme.desc: Grizz likes burritos. A lot. So much so that after a restaurant makes a bear-sized burrito, Grizz can't bring himself to eat such a majestic work of art. He carries the burrito everywhere, making it a new and increasingly smelly part of his life.

programme.title: E2 - Just Set Up The Chairs/It's Time/Weekend At Benson's/Pie Contest/Dodge This
programme.desc: While preparing for a birthday party, Mordecai and Rigby are assigned to set up chairs. They try to prove to Benson they are not slackers, but fail.

programme.title: E63 - Haunted House/Eau De Bean/Running On Empty/Bean Bug/Coffee Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to retrieve a football from a haunted house … and get back out alive.

programme.title: E58 - Tough Luck Duck/Cheesy Ball Run/Say Uncle/Here Comes The Bribe/Dental Case/Big Top To
programme.desc: Little Quaker fears his luck will turn for the worse when he inadvertently walks under a ladder. When a series of unfortunate and painful incidents happen to Tom, Jerry and Spike, but not Little Quaker, he thinks he is to blame.

programme.title: E1297 - Various Modes Of Transportation/Cool Uncles/Butter Wall/Bbraebday/Don't Press Play
programme.desc: With the other Titans away, Cyborg is forced to take a road trip with Robin.

programme.title: E150 - The Candidate/The Anybody/The Brain/The Stink/The Awareness
programme.desc: When their parents all go to a charity gala at the school, the kids are locked in a classroom with a VHS tape. However, when the room starts to heat up, they need a leader to get them out of the situation and have to choose between Anais, a qualified but unpopular candidate or Gumball, a charismatic candidate with absolutely no plans.

programme.title: E174 - Pearl Of My Dreams/ Bugs Hole Gags 2: Down The Drain/ Mech-A-Mess/Boarding Games/ Put
programme.desc: Porky and Daffy go diving for pearls. Elmer Fudd has a hunting mishap. Wile E. Coyote gets a new suit.

programme.title: E2 - Just Set Up The Chairs/This Is My Jam/Video Game Wizard/World's Best Boss/Tent Troubl
programme.desc: While preparing for a birthday party, Mordecai and Rigby are assigned to set up chairs. They try to prove to Benson they are not slackers, but fail.

Tonkatsu DJ Agetaro
programme.desc: Agetaro is the heir to his family's long-running tonkatsu (fried pork cutlet) restaurant in Shibuya, Tokyo. He spends his days chopping cabbages and slacking off because he has nothing else better to do. One day, he goes to a dance club to deliver a bento, and is thrilled to get a chance to speak to Sonoko, the girl he secretly has a crush on. He also experiences the excitement of the dance floor grooving to the music for the first time, and is filled with an uplifting sensation that he has never felt before. To win Sonoko's heart, Agetaro decides to become the “Tonkatsu DJ”, a guy who can cook both tonkatsu and the dance floor!

programme.title: Husband Killers
programme.desc: If hell hath no fury like a woman scorned, imagine the nightmare that's about to be visited upon the man who has scorned three women. Professional killer Chanel has been happily married for ten years, but she discovers that her husband has been carrying on an affair with Dior, a thief. Before the women can tear each other apart, they learn that he also has a third woman, Hermes. When the avenging duo arrives at a hotel to stop their next rendezvous, they find out that Hermes is ready for war.
